settings.text:
Have a question or comment? Don't be shy: Reach out and say hi!
Support hours: Monday-Friday, 7am-3pm

settings.heading: Still need help?
settings.description: Shoot our team an email & we’ll get back to you ASAP

settings.heading: How long does shipping take?
settings.content: Shipping times vary by location. Typically, domestic orders arrive within 5-7 business days, while international orders may take 10-15 business days. You'll receive tracking information once shipped.

settings.heading: Does my piece come in any packaging?
settings.content: Yes, each piece arrives in carefully designed packaging to ensure protection and enhance presentation. We use durable materials to keep your item safe during shipping

settings.heading: Do you ship internationally?
settings.content: Yes, we offer international shipping. Delivery times and costs vary by destination. You’ll receive tracking information to monitor your order’s progress

settings.heading: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.content: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and other secure online payment methods. Choose your preferred option at checkout for a smooth transaction

settings.heading: What are your sizing options?
settings.content: We offer a wide range of sizes from S to XL. For the best fit, please refer to our detailed size chart, which includes measurements and guidelines to help you choose the perfect size for your needs
